Summary

Business growth professional with relationship management, operations, and support experience across multiple environments.

Currently in relationship leadership roles at Hubtel and founder of Iderwell, with a practical focus on operational consistency and partner trust.

  • Education: St. John's School - Sekondi (2009-2013), University of Cape Coast from 2014
  • Current role: Hubtel relationship leadership roles (progressed to Relationship Manager in March 2025)
  • Founder: Iderwell
  • Public profile: LinkedIn
  • Hubtel profile: Team listing
